pmjay.definition: National health insurance scheme providing cashless treatment to eligible families.

pmay.definition: Central housing scheme for affordable homes in urban and rural areas.

pmayg.definition: Rural housing programme under PMAY providing pucca houses with basic amenities.

pmgsy.definition: Rural roads connectivity programme linking villages to all-weather roads.

nrlm.definition: Poverty alleviation mission promoting self-help groups and rural enterprise.

daynrlm.fullForm: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Rural Livelihoods Mission
daynrlm.definition: Renamed NRLM umbrella for rural poverty reduction and SHG-led livelihoods.

nsap.definition: Social security pensions and family benefit schemes for poor households.

icds.definition: Anganwadi-based programme for child nutrition, health and pre-school education.

nfsa.definition: Law guaranteeing subsidised food grains to eligible households via PDS.

pds.definition: Government network for distributing subsidised food and essentials.

msp.definition: Floor price at which government agencies procure crops from farmers.

fci.definition: Central agency for foodgrain procurement, storage and PDS distribution.

secc.definition: Survey data used to identify deprivation and target welfare beneficiaries.

gem.definition: Online procurement platform for government buyers and vendors.

pfms.definition: End-to-end platform for tracking government expenditure and fund flows.

cag.fullForm: Comptroller and Auditor General of India
cag.definition: Constitutional authority auditing government accounts and public spending.

cbi.definition: Premier investigating agency for corruption and major criminal cases.

ed.definition: Agency enforcing foreign exchange and money-laundering laws.

sfio.definition: Multi-disciplinary agency probing serious corporate frauds.

nclt.definition: Adjudicatory body for company law disputes and insolvency cases.

ibc.definition: Unified law for resolving corporate and individual insolvency.

gstn.definition: IT backbone for GST registration, filing and tax administration.

cbdt.definition: Policy body for administration of direct taxes including income tax.

cbic.fullForm: Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs
cbic.definition: Policy body for GST, customs and central excise administration.

niti.fullForm: National Institution for Transforming India (NITI Aayog)
niti.definition: Government think tank replacing Planning Commission; advises on policy and programmes.

fc.definition: Constitutional body recommending Centre–State tax devolution and grants.

sagarmala.definition: Port-led development initiative for coastal shipping and logistics.

uday.definition: Scheme for financial turnaround of state electricity distribution companies.

ujjwala.definition: LPG connection scheme for women from below-poverty-line households.

swachh.definition: National campaign for sanitation, toilet construction and waste management.
